description: Baseline frozen after architecture redesign (PRs #277-288). Artifact creation, intent classification, phase-aware execution, execution hardening all verified working.

tool_success_rate.description: Fraction of tool calls that succeed

artifact_success_rate.description: Fraction of generate_file calls that produce a file

error_cascade_rate.description: Fraction of requests where 2+ consecutive errors occur

research_loop_rate.description: Fraction of artifact tasks that exhaust iterations without calling generate_file
